title: Cartoons
text: Home * Cartoons Contents 1 Ragsdale 2 Diaz 3 Misc 4 References Ragsdale [ edit ] Cartoons by Jeff Ragsdale covering participants and tournament director of the ACM 1987 , published in various issues of ICCA Journal in 1987, 1988 and 1989 [1] reprinted in Kings Move - Welcome to the 1989 AGT World Computer Chess Championship [2] Diaz [ edit ] Cartoons by José Diaz [3] : Ed's Nighmare [4] Ossi Weiner , Frederic Friedel - David Levy , Mark Uniacke , Richard Lang , Manfred Hegener Alexey Manjakhin , Karl-Heinz Milaster , Tony Marsland , Mark Lefler , Dieter Steinwender (Floppy) Bart Weststrate , Ed Schröder , Johan de Koning , Frans Morsch [5] Misc [ edit ] Harry Nelson at LLNL working on Cray Blitz [6] References [ edit ] ↑ Two questions for Bob by Carey , CCC , September 30, 2008 ↑ Kings Move - Welcome to the 1989 AGT World Computer Chess Championship.
